eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 8:22 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 9:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THIS IS A CANCELLATION OF AN AMBER ALERT THAT WAS ISSUED BY SAINT LOUIS COUNTY POLICE DEPARTMENT ON 07/01/2026 AT 01:00 PM.  

ABDUCTED WAS RUDO CHITURUMANI, BLACK, FEMALE, AGE 8. 

THE VICTIM HAS BEEN FOUND SAFE. THE SUSPECT HAS NOT BEEN LOCATED.
